_comment: Canned classifier output keyed by surviving item id (dx-002 dedup'd, dx-016 dropped by look-ahead). dx-011 is materiality 1 and is dropped by the materiality floor in the process stage. Categories drawn from the diagnostics taxonomy: Clinical, Commercial, Regulatory, Financial.
tldr: Natera leads pre-market up ~8% after CMS expands Signatera breast-cancer coverage; Guardant slides on a Shield rate cut and GeneDx pops on an above-guidance preannounce.

dx-001.summary: CMS expanded Medicare coverage for Natera's Signatera MRD test to adjuvant and recurrence monitoring in breast cancer, adding an estimated 180,000 covered patients a year.

dx-003.summary: Veracyte's Decipher Prostate was added to updated NCCN guidelines at level 1B evidence, the only gene-expression test at that tier across localized risk groups.

dx-004.summary: CMS issued a preliminary gapfill cutting Guardant's Shield colorectal screening rate to $720 from $920; Guardant will seek reconsideration.

dx-005.summary: GeneDx preannounced Q2 revenue of $112-115M, well above its $102-106M guidance, on exome and genome volume strength.

dx-006.summary: Tempus and AstraZeneca expanded their partnership to co-develop a tumor-informed MRD algorithm on the xM platform, starting in lung and breast trials.

dx-007.summary: Myriad will lose its UnitedHealthcare national contract for GeneSight on September 1, pressuring about $45M of annualized revenue.

dx-008.summary: An NEJM myeloma study using Adaptive's clonoSEQ showed MRD-guided therapy de-escalation preserved outcomes, reinforcing clonoSEQ as a trial endpoint standard.

dx-009.summary: FDA finalized its phase-two LDT enforcement timeline, requiring registration, listing and adverse-event reporting for most lab tests within 12 months as legal challenges continue.

dx-010.summary: Private digital-pathology player ArteraAI raised a $90M Series C to expand beyond prostate into breast and bladder, now deployed at 60-plus sites.

dx-011.summary: Personalis management will present at the Goldman Sachs Global Healthcare Conference.

dx-012.summary: Castle's DecisionDx-Melanoma data from a 10,000-patient registry was selected for an ASCO oral session, linking test-guided surveillance to earlier recurrence detection.

dx-013.summary: BillionToOne's UNITY Fetal Risk Screen gained Medicaid reimbursement in Ohio and Georgia, bringing covered states to 14.

dx-014.summary: Caris received FDA Breakthrough Device designation for its blood-based therapy-selection assay in solid tumors, accelerating its planned PMA submission.

dx-015.summary: Commercial payers are widening prior-authorization requirements across genomic testing, lengthening cash-collection cycles sector-wide.

dx-017.summary: Biodesix published a prospective CHEST study showing its Nodify strategy reclassified 42% of intermediate-risk lung nodules, cutting unnecessary procedures.

dx-018.summary: Guardant's Reveal ctDNA assay detected colorectal recurrence a median 5.2 months ahead of imaging in a JCO surveillance study.

dx-019.summary: Veracyte set August 4 for its Q2 2026 earnings release; consensus models about 11% testing-revenue growth.
